name: unifi-mcp
description: UniFi network management via MCP tools. Monitor devices, clients, network health, firewall rules, and perform management operations.

unifi_url.title: UniFi Controller URL
unifi_url.description: URL of your UniFi controller, e.g. https://192.168.1.1:443. No trailing slash.

unifi_username.title: UniFi Username
unifi_username.description: UniFi controller local admin username (not UniFi Cloud SSO).

unifi_password.title: UniFi Password
unifi_password.description: Create a dedicated read-only UniFi local account for MCP access. Do NOT use your admin password. If UniFi supports API tokens, prefer those instead.
